name: PRISP: Privacy-Safe Few-Shot Personalization via Lightweight Adaptation
summary: arXiv:2601.06471v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) personalization aims to adapt general-purpose models to individual users. Most existing methods, however, are de...
description: arXiv:2601.06471v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) personalization aims to adapt general-purpose models to individual users. Most existing methods, however, are developed under data-rich and resource-abundant settings, often incurring privacy risks. In contrast, realistic personalization typically occurs after deployment under (i) extremely limited user data, (...
author: Junho Park, Dohoon Kim, Taesup Moon
